verdict.description: Whether the PR upholds the stored mental model (compliant) or contradicts it (diverges).

divergences.description: One entry per stored decision/convention the diff contradicts; empty when compliant.

decision.description: The MM decision/convention diverged from (e.g. an ADR id or arc42 section).

detail.description: What the diff does that contradicts it.

evidence.description: Changed file path / hunk citation grounding the divergence.

fix.description: One-line remediation (change the code, or update the MM).

examined.description: MM docs + changed files the agent inspected (negative-attestation trace).
